productDisplayName: Puma Men Heroes Black Track Pant
description: CompositionBlack tracks made of 100% polyester, has two zipper pockets on the sides, white running patch along the sides, drawstring waist with a drawstring on the inside, zipper enclosure along the seams above the ankles, and embedded brand logo on the left leg FittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry clean  Look good and stay comfortable all year in this trackpant from puma. The embedded cat logo on the left leg and piping details makes this a really cool garment, while the polyester fabric offers sweat-free comfort.
